source_jobs.description:
<p><strong>Objective of the Role</strong><br>The primary objective of this role is to lead and support the production of effective code based on requirements,&nbsp; leveraging expertise in design and development best practices. Responsible for ensuring the desired level of quality and appropriate use of selected methodologies. Solve complex problems autonomously and contribute&nbsp; to high-quality technical documentation.</p>
<p><strong>Main Responsibilities</strong><br>• Lead the development of mobile applications and support the effective production of code based on&nbsp; requirements, collaborating in their determination.<br>• Provide expertise in cutting-edge design and development practices.<br>• Ensure the desired level of quality and appropriate use of secure development methodologies within the&nbsp; organization.<br>• Ensure delivered code is always functionally correct.<br>• Solve complex challenges in mobile app development autonomously.<br>• Contribute to high-quality technical documentation.<br>• Write excellent code based on requirements from architects and product owners.<br>• Write error-free and vulnerability-free code.<br>• Review and provide feedback on code, identifying issues and conventions.<br>• Create valuable and meaningful automated tests.<br>• Ensure the technical feasibility of UI/UX designs and their integration into the app.<br>• Optimize the app for maximum speed and scalability.<br>• Analyze, debug, and solve complex errors.<br>• Implement continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) within the testing cycle.<br>• Keep task statuses updated in Jira.<br>• Collaborate in pair programming with other engineers to improve quality.<br>• Provide support to support engineers in diagnosing and solving problems.<br>• Comply with documentation and secure development procedures and regulations.<br>• Actively contribute to reducing technical debt and refactoring processes.<br>• Lead teams and assume a technical leadership role in projects.<br>• Foster innovation and creativity in mobile app development.<br>• Act as a mentor for other developers, providing technical support in problem-solving and challenges.<br>• Test product usability and accessibility.<br>• Maintain updated documentation on architectures, procedures, and operational tools.<br>• Follow data architecture guidelines on how to collect and store information.<br>• Generate and deliver design documentation and information availability to the data team.<br>• Collaborate and mentor team members.<br>• Provide development estimates.<br>• Develop tools and scripts to automate operational tasks and deployment processes.<br>• Conduct code reviews (quality, consistency, and best practices).<br>• Facilitate knowledge transfer between operations and development teams.<br>• Implement version control systems to manage source code and infrastructure.<br>• Collaborate on effective branching and merging strategies.<br>• Manage and operate critical production systems and services.<br>• Ensure system availability and performance.<br>• Diagnose and resolve performance and scalability issues.<br>• Collaborate with SRE teams to properly size infrastructure.<br>• Manage application and system configurations to ensure consistency and reproducibility (Desirable).<br>• Use tools like CloudFormation and Terraform to manage IAC (Desirable AWS).<br>• Automate the creation and configuration of infrastructure environments (Desirable).<br>• Promote an autonomous work culture by encouraging self-management, accountability, and <p><strong>Objective of the Role</strong><br>Plays a critical role in leading the design, development, and implementation of scalable and innovative&nbsp;<br>technology solutions. This role drives technical excellence, fosters collaboration across teams, and ensures that&nbsp;<br>engineering efforts align with the organization’s strategic goals. By mentoring engineers and influencing&nbsp;<br>architectural decisions, enhances the delivery of impactful, business-aligned solutions that support long-term&nbsp;<br>success.</p>
<p><strong>Main Responsibilities</strong><br>• Provide expert technical guidance and support to squads or pods, ensuring high-quality development and&nbsp;<br>alignment with business objectives.<br>• Collaborate with product managers, designers, and business leaders to define technical solutions that&nbsp;<br>address strategic needs, align with roadmaps, and meet user expectations.<br>• Lead the design and development of complex software architectures, focusing on scalability,&nbsp;<br>maintainability, and performance while ensuring alignment with the organization’s technology roadmap.<br>• Influence architectural decisions by contributing to the strategic direction of technology solutions and&nbsp;<br>providing input on long-term engineering priorities.<br>• Foster cross-functional collaboration between engineering, product, and business teams to ensure&nbsp;<br>seamless execution of projects and alignment with organizational objectives.<br>• Mentor and coach junior and senior engineers, promoting professional growth and knowledge sharing to&nbsp;<br>enhance team capabilities.<br>• Advocate for and implement best practices in software development, including TDD, CI/CD pipelines, and&nbsp;<br>secure coding principles.<br>• Drive the adoption of innovative technologies and methodologies to improve efficiency, scalability, and&nbsp;<br>competitiveness across engineering projects.<br>• Monitor the performance of systems post-implementation, leveraging metrics to identify optimization&nbsp;<br>opportunities and ensure solutions meet business and technical requirements.<br>• Develop tools and automation scripts to streamline operational tasks and deployment processes,&nbsp;<br>ensuring consistency and reliability in delivery.<br>• Partner with SRE teams to optimize infrastructure, design fault-tolerant systems, and maintain SLA.<br>• Ensure compliance with industry regulations and security standards, implementing robust protection&nbsp;<br>measures and maintaining high levels of quality assurance.<br>• Promote an autonomous work culture by encouraging self-management, accountability, and proactive&nbsp;<br>problem-solving among team members.<br>• Serve as a Spin Culture Ambassador to foster and maintain a positive, inclusive, and dynamic work&nbsp;<br>environment that aligns with the company's values and culture.<br><br><strong>Required Knowledge and Experience</strong><br>• 7+ years of experience in software development, with a proven track record of delivering scalable and&nbsp;<br>high-performance applications.<br>• Advanced expertise in programming languages such as .NET, Java, TypeScript, React, React Native, and&nbsp;<br>Node.js.<br>• Deep understanding of containerized development, microservices architecture, and REST API&nbsp;<br>consumption.<br>• Experience with modular architectures, reusable components, and superapps.<br>• Advanced knowledge of Git, conflict resolution, and source_jobs.title: IC5 - Staff Engineer
IC5 - Staff SRE
source_jobs.description: <p><strong>Objective of the Role</strong><br>The <span style="text-decoration: underline;">Staff Infrastructure Engineer – SRE</span> is a senior technical leader responsible for architecting and scaling the reliability, availability, and performance of critical infrastructure platforms. This role combines deep technical expertise, cross-team influence, and a strategic mindset to drive high-impact initiatives across engineering teams, ensuring operational excellence and long-term system resilience.<br><br><strong>Main Responsibilities</strong><br>• Design and evolve complex infrastructure systems to ensure scalability, reliability, and security of platform services.<br>• Define long-term architectural vision and influence infrastructure roadmap across multiple teams and services.<br>• Lead strategic SRE initiatives, collaborating with cross-functional teams to improve system resiliency and reduce operational toil.<br>• Identify systemic issues and lead root cause analysis efforts, establishing long-term corrective measures.<br>• Champion best practices in observability, including metrics, logging, and alerting frameworks for production systems.<br>• Design and implement advanced automation solutions to optimize infrastructure performance and operational workflows.<br>• Partner with security and compliance teams to ensure infrastructure meets regulatory and organizational standards.<br>• Mentor senior and mid-level engineers, fostering knowledge sharing and technical growth across the organization.<br>• Serve as a technical advisor to leadership, providing insight on system health, risk, and architectural tradeoffs.<br>• Collaborate with Product, Engineering, and Data teams to support the needs of autonomous squads while maintaining infrastructure cohesion.<br>• Lead capacity planning efforts across critical services to anticipate future growth and ensure infrastructure scalability.<br>• Own and continuously improve disaster recovery strategies and testing plans to maintain business continuity.<br>• Contribute to and enforce standards for infrastructure documentation, design reviews, and change management processes.<br>• Foster a culture of reliability engineering, automation-first mindset, and operational accountability.<br>• Embody and promote Spin’s cultural values, acting as a role model of collaboration, innovation, and ownership.<br>• Promote an autonomous work culture by encouraging self-management, accountability, and proactive problem-solving among team members.<br>• Serve as a Spin Culture Ambassador to foster and maintain a positive, inclusive, and dynamic work environment that aligns with the company's values and culture.<br><br><strong>Required Knowledge and Experience</strong><br>• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent practical experience.<br>• 7+ years of experience in infrastructure, site reliability, or platform engineering roles.<br>• Proven experience designing and operating reliable systems at scale, including distributed systems and cloud-native platforms.<br>• Advanced knowledge of infrastructure-as-code tools, container orchestration systems (e.g., Kubernetes), and CI/CD practices.<br>• Strong programming and scripting skills (e.g., Python, Go, Bash).<br>• Deep understanding of monitoring, alerting, and incident management practices.<br>• Experience working with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and hybrid environments.<br>• Demonstrated ability to drive cross-team collaboration and influence engineering practices across domains.<br>• Strong leadership presence, excellent communication skills, and ability to present complex ideas to technical and non-technical audiences.<br>• High level of autonomy, initiative,
